summary: TWO_COLUMN: NumberPlane with static vector-field arrows on LEFT; always_redraw 4-spoke paddle wheel at origin rotates via ValueTracker phi_tr. Three phases via Transform: F=(-y,x) curl=+2 (fast CCW spin), F=(y,0) curl=-1 (slow CW), F=(1,½) curl=0 (freeze). RIGHT panel shows field, curl, and formula ω = ½(∂Q/∂x - ∂P/∂y).
